_publications._publicationTitle: Unraveling the development of cutaneous neurofibromas in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: TOM+ AQP1high NESTINlow multipolar cells predominantly at the epidermis-dermis junction, likely corresponding to subepidermal glia
details: Successfully identified TOM+ AQP1high NESTINlow multipolar cells at epidermis-dermis junction corresponding to subepidermal glia
